login.subtitle: Professional workspace
login.multiSociete: Your account is linked to several companies.

login.subtitle: Access your purchase file securely
login.hint: No password required — we'll email you a secure single-use link.
login.consent: By requesting an access link, you consent to the processing of your personal data as part of your purchase file (Law 09-08). See our
login.sentTo: A secure link has been sent to {{email}}. It is valid for 48 hours.

payments.movedBefore: The payment schedule is now available in the tab

ventes.title: My Purchase
ventes.subtitle: Track your file's progress in real time
ventes.empty: No sale recorded for your file.
ventes.contractPending: Your contract will appear here as soon as your advisor generates it.
ventes.uploadSignedBody: After signing and legalization at the notary, upload your signed copy here.
ventes.legalAck: I certify that I have read, signed and legalized this sale contract in accordance with Law No. 44-00 of 3 October 2002 on off-plan property sales (VEFA). I acknowledge having received a copy of the contract, signed it before the officiating notary, and hereby transmit a signed and legalized copy to the real-estate agency by this digital channel, in accordance with the Dahir of Obligations and Contracts (D.O.C.).
ventes.signedReceived: Your signed contract has been received by the agency.

contracts.subtitle: Find your sale contracts and their status here
contracts.empty: No contract found for your file.

property.title: My Property
property.constructionDesc: Real-time tracking of construction progress will be available soon.

statutDesc.PROSPECT: Initial commercial interest — no commitment yet
statutDesc.RESERVE: Reservation signed with a security deposit (≤ 5%)
statutDesc.EN_RETRACTATION: Legal withdrawal period under way (7 days)
statutDesc.ACOMPTE: Down payment made by the buyer
statutDesc.COMPROMIS: Preliminary contract signed — financing and conditions pending
statutDesc.FINANCEMENT: Financing file submitted — awaiting bank approval
statutDesc.ACTE: Authentic deed signed before a notary — ownership transferred
statutDesc.LIVRE_AVEC_RESERVES: Property delivered with reserves to lift
statutDesc.RESERVES_LEVEES: All delivery reserves have been lifted
statutDesc.LIVRE_DEFINITIF: Property handed over to the buyer — sale finalized
statutDesc.ANNULE: Sale cancelled — see reason in the file

attention.retractationPossible: Buyer can still withdraw for {{days}} days — sale not secured
attention.financingOverdue: Financing deadline passed without approval — risk of lapse
attention.ready: No pending action — ready for the next step

confirm.retractation: Confirm withdrawal? The sale will be cancelled and the property released.

errors.pvGen: Failed to generate the handover report.
errors.coAcqRequired: First and last name are required.
errors.contractGenerate: An error occurred while generating the contract.
errors.contractSign: An error occurred while signing the contract.

ui.title: Sale
ui.advancePipelineTitle: Move the sale to the next pipeline stage, or cancel it
ui.noRemboursement: No refund recorded for this cancelled sale.
ui.depositLabel: Security deposit (MAD) — max 5% of the price (Art. 618-4)
ui.reservesLabel: Reserves (one per line — leave empty for a delivery with no reserve)
ui.reservesPlaceholder:
e.g. Crack in living-room ceiling
Roller shutter bedroom 2
ui.noDatedDeadline: No dated deadline at this stage
ui.delaiSruTitle: Legal 10-day withdrawal period (Art. L271-1) — the buyer may cancel without reason before this date
ui.limiteFinancementTitle: Deadline to obtain financing — condition precedent
ui.portalDesc: Send a secure access link to the buyer so they can follow the progress of their sale and its installments.
ui.contractPendingDesc: Generate the contract PDF to download it, have it signed, and archive it in the sale file.
ui.contractGeneratedDesc: The contract has been generated and is ready to be signed.
ui.noPdfTitle: The contract status is GENERATED but no PDF has been produced yet
ui.regenerateTitle: The PDF does not exist yet — click to generate the document
ui.noPdfSigned: No PDF available for this signed contract.
ui.generateLegalTitle: Generates the 7 calls for funds (Art. 618-17, Law 44-00)
ui.pvLivraisonTitle: Generates the delivery report with the list of reserves

list.title: Sales
list.loadError: An error occurred while loading sales.

create.title: New sale
create.priceRequired: The sale price is required and must be positive.

advance.guardedBody: This step has legal checks (Law 44-00) and is done via the “{{action}}” action in the “VEFA actions” panel, not from the generic advance flow. You can still cancel the sale below.

guarded.EN_RETRACTATION: Exercise withdrawal (or wait for the legal period to end)

hintBody.cancel: This action permanently ends the sale. The reason will be recorded for traceability. The buyer is not notified automatically.
hintBody.FINANCEMENT: The buyer's financing file is under review. Enter the deadline for the credit condition precedent below if applicable.
hintBody.ACTE: Signing the authentic deed before a notary formalizes the transfer of ownership. The signing date is required.
hintBody.LIVRE_DEFINITIF: The property is handed over to the buyer. Enter the actual delivery date. You can also enter the handover report date if available.

createPage.title: Start the sale pipeline
createPage.priceMustBePositive: The price must be greater than 0.
createPage.remainingBalance: Balance still due from the buyer:
createPage.compromisHint: Date the preliminary sale contract is signed
createPage.deliveryHint: Estimated date for handing over the keys
createPage.next1: The sale will be created with status
createPage.next2: The reservation will be marked as converted
createPage.next3: The property will be marked as
createPage.next4: The contact will move to status
createPage.priceError: The sale price must be greater than 0.

import.title: Import contacts (CSV)
import.hintIntro: CSV file (Excel: “Save as → CSV UTF-8”). Required columns:
import.hintRest: ; recognized: phone, email, ID, address, notes. Each row must have a phone or an email.
import.basisConsent: These contacts gave their consent (paper, email…)
import.previewHeadline: Preview — nothing has been created yet:
import.truncated: List truncated — only the first 100 issues are shown.
import.importError: Import failed. Check the file format and try again.

list.title: Properties
list.subtitle: Manage your property inventory
list.emptyDesc: Add your first property manually or import a list via CSV.
list.projectHint: Each property must belong to a project
list.refHint: Must be unique in your account
list.mediaHint: Media (photos, plans) can be added from the property record after creation.

csv.summary: CSV import — required format & column reference
csv.intro: Upload a .csv file (UTF-8, comma-separated) with the following columns. The first row must be the header row. Columns marked * are required.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.mainFieldsRequired: Type, reference code and title are required.
errors.surfaceRequired: Surface (m²) is required for this property type.
errors.landRequired: Land area is required for this property type.
errors.roomsRequired: The number of bedrooms and bathrooms is required.

errors.commercialSaveFailed: Failed to save the commercial sheet.

list.title: Real-estate projects
list.emptyDesc: Create your first project to group your properties.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

IMMEUBLES.label: Buildings project
IMMEUBLES.hint: Apartments, Duplexes, Retail — several buildings per phase

VILLAS.label: Villas project
VILLAS.hint: Individual houses with land, optional pool / garden

s1.title: Program information
s1.intro: Enter the general information of your real-estate program.
s1.name: Program name *

s2.title: Delivery phases
s2.explain: A phase groups the buildings built and delivered together on a specific date. Each phase's delivery date appears in buyers' reservation contracts. A simple program has only one phase.

s3.villaIntro: Define the naming and add the villa groups per phase.
s3.buildIntro: Define the common naming, then add the buildings of each phase.
s3.nbVillasGroup: Number of villas in this group

s4.villaIntro: For each villa group, set the surface, land, price and options.
s4.lotsIntro: For each building, configure the type and features of each floor.

s5.title: Review — Summary
s5.intro: Check the configuration before launching generation.

building.emptyHint: Use the project generator to create the phases and buildings.
building.noUnitInBuilding: No unit recorded in this building.

alert.upToDate: You're up to date — no pending action

dirigeant.tunnelEnCoursTitle: Preliminary + financing — not yet at deed
dirigeant.tunnelActeTitle: Notarial deed signed, not yet delivered — commercial close (= absorption base)
dirigeant.portfolioSub: Catalog value · unsold stock · average price

commercial.actionsTitle: Deals to follow up — no progress

projets.typeAnalysisSub: Stock · absorption · avg ticket · velocity (avg days to DELIVERED)

vueGroupe.title: Group view
vueGroupe.sub: Your consolidated companies · revenue, stock, treasury and alerts.
